completed_column_label: Which BINGO column is fully marked?
Which column label has all five cells marked?
What is the completed column label?
Looking at the marked cells, which column is complete?
completed_line_sum_value: What is the sum of the five printed numbers in the completed {line_axis}?
Add the printed numbers in the completed {line_axis}. What is the sum?
Find the completed {line_axis} and report the sum of its five printed numbers.
Using the completed {line_axis}, what total do its five numbers make?
What number do you get after adding the five values in the completed {line_axis}?
near_complete_row_count: {near_complete_line_rule_text} How many near-complete rows are there?
Count the rows that are exactly one mark away from complete. {near_complete_line_rule_text}
How many rows have exactly one unmarked cell?
{near_complete_line_rule_text} What is the number of near-complete rows?
Looking at the marked cells, how many rows need one more mark to be complete?
near_complete_column_count: {near_complete_line_rule_text} How many near-complete columns are there?
Count the columns that are exactly one mark away from complete. {near_complete_line_rule_text}
How many columns have exactly one unmarked cell?
{near_complete_line_rule_text} What is the number of near-complete columns?
Looking at the marked cells, how many columns need one more mark to be complete?
called_number_match_count: {called_number_match_rule_text} How many numbers in the CALLED list appear on the bingo card?
Using the CALLED list, count how many listed numbers are printed on the bingo card.
How many CALLED numbers can you find on the card?
{called_number_match_rule_text} Count the CALLED-list values that appear on the card.
Compare the CALLED list with the card. How many called values are present?

answer_and_annotation:
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Required annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Required answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Final answer format: {answer_hint}.
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

query:completed_column_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the completed column label as B, I, N, G, or O
query:completed_column_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment using two pixel-point endpoints [x, y] in [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]] form, at the centers of the top and bottom cells in the completed column

query:completed_line_sum_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the sum of the five printed numbers in the completed row or column
query:completed_line_sum_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of points [x, y], one at the center of each of the five cells in the completed row or column

query:near_complete_row_count.near_complete_line_rule_text: A near-complete row is a row with exactly one unmarked cell.
query:near_complete_row_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of near-complete rows
query:near_complete_row_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the single unmarked gap cell in each near-complete row

query:near_complete_column_count.near_complete_line_rule_text: A near-complete column is a column with exactly one unmarked cell.
query:near_complete_column_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of near-complete columns
query:near_complete_column_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the single unmarked gap cell in each near-complete column

query:called_number_match_count.called_number_match_rule_text: Some CALLED-list numbers may not appear on the card.
query:called_number_match_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of CALLED-list numbers that appear on the card
query:called_number_match_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of pixel-space cell boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the card cells whose printed numbers are in the CALLED list
